error_signature: websocket connection failed due to missing WEBHOOK_URL
title: WebSocket connection failure in Chat node
symptom: The workflow hangs before the 'Respond to Chat' node with 'Waiting for...'. The browser attempts to connect to localhost instead of the correct URL.
applies_when: Running n8n on an internal network
root_cause: When the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable is not set, n8n defaults to using localhost for WebSocket connections. This causes the connection to fail if n8n is accessed via a different hostname, leading to the workflow hanging.
fix_steps: Set the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable to the correct external URL (e.g., 'http://n8n.home.arpa')
Restart the n8n instance to apply the changes
Test the workflow again to ensure it proceeds past the Chat node
agent_instruction: Set the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable to your n8n instance's external URL and restart n8n.
